ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the stock price data is recorded */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for splits and dividends */,
  "technical_indicators" TEXT /* Computed technical indicators (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol used to represent the company on the exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "CEO" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user (e.g., basic, pro, enterprise) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_level FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_level") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Name of the subscription level */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features available in this subscription level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data_export) */,
  "data_used" INTEGER /* Amount of data used in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "activity_date")
)
